meaning: n.轻佻女子,风骚女子,<古>妓女,荡妇
examples: Minx is lifting at the free edge.
Was Minx applied over the cuticle?
Her hair was blonde, brunette, raven-black, silver minx, as the mood took her.
The Beano had Dennis the Menace and Minnie the Minx but sometimes they crossed over into each others stories in a shared world of peashooters and mud pies.
